lines.english: Who was the thief?
lines.chinese: 谁是小偷？
lines.raw: Who was the thief? | 谁是小偷？

lines.english: People are not so honest as
lines.chinese: 人们不像从前那样诚实，
lines.raw: People are not so honest as | 人们不像从前那样诚实，

lines.english: they once were.
lines.chinese: 曾经是那样。
lines.raw: they once were. | 曾经是那样。

lines.english: The temptation to steal is greater than
lines.chinese: 偷窃的诱惑比以往任何时候都
lines.raw: The temptation to steal is greater than | 偷窃的诱惑比以往任何时候都

lines.english: ever before--especially in large shops.
lines.chinese: 更大——尤其是在大型商店里。
lines.raw: ever before--especially in large shops. | 更大——尤其是在大型商店里。

lines.english: A detective recently watched a well-dressed
lines.chinese: 一名侦探最近发现一名穿着考究的
lines.raw: A detective recently watched a well-dressed | 一名侦探最近发现一名穿着考究的

lines.english: woman who always went into a large store
lines.chinese: 妇女，她总是周一上午
lines.raw: woman who always went into a large store | 妇女，她总是周一上午

lines.english: on Monday mornings.
lines.chinese: 去一家大商店。
lines.raw: on Monday mornings. | 去一家大商店。

lines.english: One Monday,
lines.chinese: 有一个周一，
lines.raw: One Monday, | 有一个周一，

lines.english: there were fewer people in the shop
lines.chinese: 商店里的人比平时
lines.raw: there were fewer people in the shop | 商店里的人比平时

lines.english: than usual when the woman came in,
lines.chinese: 少，当时那个妇女进来了，
lines.raw: than usual when the woman came in, | 少，当时那个妇女进来了，

lines.english: so it was easier for the detective to watch her.
lines.chinese: 因此侦探更容易监视她。
lines.raw: so it was easier for the detective to watch her. | 因此侦探更容易监视她。

lines.english: The woman first bought a few small articles.
lines.chinese: 这名妇女首先买了几件小商品。
lines.raw: The woman first bought a few small articles. | 这名妇女首先买了几件小商品。

lines.english: After a little time,
lines.chinese: 过了一会儿，
lines.raw: After a little time, | 过了一会儿，

lines.english: she chose one of the most expensive dresses
lines.chinese: 她选择了一件店里最昂贵的
lines.raw: she chose one of the most expensive dresses | 她选择了一件店里最昂贵的

lines.english: in the shop and handed it to an assistant
lines.chinese: 连衣裙，并把它递给了一名店员，
lines.raw: in the shop and handed it to an assistant | 连衣裙，并把它递给了一名店员，

lines.english: who wrapped it up for her as quickly as possible.
lines.chinese: 店员尽快地为她包好了。
lines.raw: who wrapped it up for her as quickly as possible. | 店员尽快地为她包好了。

lines.english: Then the woman simply took the parcel
lines.chinese: 然后，这名妇女只是拿起包裹
lines.raw: Then the woman simply took the parcel | 然后，这名妇女只是拿起包裹

lines.english: and walked out of the shop without paying.
lines.chinese: 没有付钱就走出了商店。
lines.raw: and walked out of the shop without paying. | 没有付钱就走出了商店。

lines.english: When she was arrested,
lines.chinese: 当她被捕时，
lines.raw: When she was arrested, | 当她被捕时，

lines.english: the detective found out that
lines.chinese: 侦探发现
lines.raw: the detective found out that | 侦探发现

lines.english: the shop assistant was her daughter.
lines.chinese: 这名店员是她的女儿。
lines.raw: the shop assistant was her daughter. | 这名店员是她的女儿。

lines.english: The girl 'gave' her mother
lines.chinese: 这女孩每周“送给”她母亲
lines.raw: The girl 'gave' her mother | 这女孩每周“送给”她母亲

lines.english: a free dress once a week!
lines.chinese: 一件免费连衣裙！
lines.raw: a free dress once a week! | 一件免费连衣裙！
